name: Memories of Eufaula | ** Reuben Francis Kolb: A Brief
snippet: Reuben Francis Kolb: A Brief Overview of His Life and Eufaula Homes Plus the Shorter Opera House Reuben Francis (R. F.) Kolb, Sr. (1839-1918) was a noted farmer and politician from Barbour County. The nephew of Governor John Gill Shorter, Kolb made a name for himself as Captain of Kolb’s Battery during the Civil War, as Agricultural Commissioner for the State of Alabama and a four-time ...
